The '''Telkadis hiding tree spider''' was a mostly static predator from [[Telkadis]]. Spider's eggs hatched inside a [[taku]] tree and hatchlings burrowed deeper inside the trunk while they grew. They hunted small rodents like [[volete]]s, preying by the presence of heat in the surroundings. Their [[Poison/Legends|poison]] was not lethal for humanoid-sized creatures.<ref name="CG" />

{{Creature-stub}}
